note: Review of the security-hardening diff (middleware + access_log + reject logging). vibe-code-reviewer returned 0 findings on the diff. Security folded forward from the fresh audit at verify 2026-07-19T02-02-08Z. Findings below are the standing accepted/deferred advisory backlog for the whole service (none new this pass).

findings.message: sqlite insert/get run synchronously in async handlers; only store_stream is offloaded. MVP-acceptable (R-2).
findings.remediation: Wrap metadata calls in run_in_threadpool if concurrency grows.

findings.message: Oversized non-file field maps to 413 not 400 (shares 'maximum size' substring). Nit; nothing persisted (R-3).
findings.remediation: Distinguish 'Field exceeded' from 'Part exceeded' if precise status matters.

findings.message: resolve_type re-checks ext already ensured by check_extension in the upload path; kept for standalone reuse (S-1).
findings.remediation: Leave as-is or drop the duplicate guard.

findings.message: Head-only (8 KiB) content validation; contained by attachment+nosniff (VF-5).
findings.remediation: Accept under the serving contract, or scan the full stream if stronger guarantees needed.

findings.message: Open dep floors; mitigated by committed uv.lock (VF-6).
findings.remediation: Add conservative upper bounds; keep uv.lock committed.

findings.message: Middleware streaming->413 path only unit-tested; TestClient always sets Content-Length (VF-8).
findings.remediation: Add a raw-ASGI/httpx-transport chunked-body integration test.

findings.message: No expiry reaper — expired quarantine files persist forever (documented deferral) (VF-9).
findings.remediation: Add a reaper unlinking files + deleting rows where expires_at <= now.
